storylets.title: {=floor_quartermaster_warning_short_rations_title}Short rations tomorrow
storylets.setup: {=floor_quartermaster_warning_short_rations_setup}Short rations from tomorrow. Plan accordingly. The quartermaster does not soften it, and no one asks him to say it twice.

storylets.title: {=floor_quartermaster_warning_wagon_late_title}Wagon is late
storylets.setup: {=floor_quartermaster_warning_wagon_late_setup}The supply wagon is late. We eat what we have. The quartermaster counts sacks twice and then a third time, as if the number might improve.

storylets.title: {=floor_quartermaster_warning_feed_the_horses_title}Horses first
storylets.setup: {=floor_quartermaster_warning_feed_the_horses_setup}Fodder is thin. Feed the horses first; men second. The rule is old and the reason is older: a column without horses is a column that does not move.

storylets.title: {=floor_quartermaster_warning_no_wine_title}No wine this week
storylets.setup: {=floor_quartermaster_warning_no_wine_setup}Wine ration is done. It will not be replaced this week. A few men curse under their breath; the quartermaster pretends he did not hear them.

storylets.title: {=floor_quartermaster_warning_forage_tomorrow_title}Foragers at dawn
storylets.setup: {=floor_quartermaster_warning_forage_tomorrow_setup}Foragers ride out at dawn. Hope they come back with something. The quartermaster does not wish them luck; luck is not a thing he has ever put much stock in.
